capability_objective: Cancel candidate record Casey Evans 131 (rec-231) as a duplicate candidate profile approved for removal. If the call times out, retrieve rec-231 and retry only if its stored status remains active; a cancelled status means stop. Do not infer a result from the timeout or create another profile.
prompt: Cancel candidate record Casey Evans 131 (rec-231) as a duplicate candidate profile approved for removal. Use the candidate administration executable available in the workspace and inspect its built-in help as needed; do not edit its backing data directly. If the cancellation call times out, retrieve rec-231 from the same executable and retry only if its stored status remains active. A stored cancelled status means stop. Do not infer the result from a timeout and do not create another candidate profile.
